casos.presentacion: A 58-year-old man is referred to your surgical oncology clinic following diagnosis of a 4 cm sigmoid colon adenocarcinoma. Colonoscopy confirms the lesion at 30 cm from the anal verge. CT chest/abdomen/pelvis shows no distant metastases but identifies two suspicious periaortic lymph nodes. MSI/MMR testing is pending. He is otherwise well, ECOG 0.
puntosClave: Explain the biological basis of tumour invasion and metastasis relevant to surgical decision-making
Apply R-classification (R0/R1/R2) and interpret its prognostic implications
Justify the principles of lymphadenectomy and sentinel node biopsy
Describe the rationale and sequencing of neoadjuvant and adjuvant therapy
Define the structure and evidence base for multidisciplinary tumour boards

casos.presentacion: A 62-year-old man is referred with a 2-week history of rectal bleeding and change in bowel habit. Colonoscopy identifies a 3 cm mass at 8 cm from the anal verge. Biopsy confirms adenocarcinoma. He has no significant comorbidities (ECOG 0). His wife is present and very anxious about whether he will 'need a bag'.
puntosClave: Describe the anatomical basis and surgical planes of TME
Apply NCCN 2026 staging criteria to determine neoadjuvant strategy for rectal cancer
Identify the technical steps and critical landmarks of right hemicolectomy, left hemicolectomy, and low anterior resection
Interpret MRI mesorectal staging and CRM threat assessment
Grade and manage anastomotic leak using the International Study Group classification

casos.presentacion: You are a PGY3 surgical resident who has noticed that patients undergoing emergency colostomy reversal (Hartmann's reversal) at your centre have a higher anastomotic leak rate when the reversal is performed within 3 months of the original operation compared to those operated after 6 months. You want to design a study to test this observation formally.
puntosClave: Apply the FINER criteria to evaluate the quality of a research question
Construct a PICO question from a clinical observation
Distinguish null hypothesis, alternative hypothesis, and directional hypothesis
Identify common errors in hypothesis formulation (HARKing, p-hacking, outcome switching)
Match a hypothesis to an appropriate study design

casos.presentacion: Caso de examen oral sobre Gastric Cancer (Surgical Oncology). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Surgical Anatomy and Lymph Node Stations; Operative Procedures; Post-Gastrectomy Syndromes; Gastric Cancer Staging and Lymphadenectomy.

Caso de examen oral sobre Hepatopancreatic-Biliary Surgery (Surgical Oncology). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Liver: Couinaud Anatomy and Resection Planning; Pancreaticoduodenectomy (Whipple Procedure); Cholangiocarcinoma; Pancreatic Cancer — Resectability Criteria & Borderline Disease.

Caso de examen oral sobre Breast Surgery & Melanoma (Surgical Oncology). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Breast Conservation vs Mastectomy; Sentinel Node Biopsy Technique; Molecular Subtypes and Surgical Implications; Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy — Indications & Surgical Planning.

Caso de examen oral sobre Sarcoma & Peritoneal Oncology (Surgical Oncology). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Retroperitoneal Sarcoma; Cytoreductive Surgery + HIPEC; PIPAC — Pressurised Intraperitoneal Aerosol Chemotherapy; Pseudomyxoma Peritonei — Histological Subtypes & CRS+HIPEC.

Caso de examen oral sobre Endocrine Surgery (Surgical Oncology). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Thyroid Cancer — Classification, Staging & Oncological Management; Thyroidectomy — Technique & Nerve Monitoring; Complications of Thyroid Surgery; Primary Hyperparathyroidism & Parathyroid Carcinoma.

Caso de examen oral sobre Emergency Surgery (General Surgery). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Acute Appendicitis; Perforated Peptic Ulcer; Small Bowel Obstruction; Damage Control Surgery.

Caso de examen oral sobre Hernia Surgery (General Surgery). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Anatomy of Groin Hernias; Operative Techniques; Laparoscopic Groin Hernia Repair — TEP & TAPP Technical Details; Complex Incisional Hernia.

Caso de examen oral sobre Bariatric & Metabolic Surgery (General Surgery). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Indications and Patient Selection; Pre-operative Assessment & Multidisciplinary Team; RYGB — Operative Steps & Anatomy; Sleeve Gastrectomy — Operative Steps & Bougie Size.

Caso de examen oral sobre Endocrine Surgery (General Surgery). El examinador planteará un escenario clínico de esta área. Prepárate para el diagnóstico diferencial, las pruebas indicadas y el manejo. Temas de la materia: Thyroid Nodule and Cancer; Thyroidectomy — Technique & Nerve Monitoring; Complications of Thyroid Surgery; Primary Hyperparathyroidism.
